title: Savory Uruguayan Haricot Bean Stew
description: A traditional Uruguayan dish featuring haricot beans, this stew is a fatty and springy nostalgic treat, made with fry grind rice khuao khuah and is gluten free friendly, cooked to perfection in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Cook the haricot beans according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced pork sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked haricot beans, cooked fry grind rice khuao khuah, salt, and black pepper to the Dutch oven.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
